name: Organize team standup
description: Schedule and conduct a daily team standup meeting to sync on progress.
steps: Conduct meeting and capture action items

name: Create project documentation
description: Write comprehensive documentation for the new project module.

name: Fix critical bug in production
description: Rapidly identify and resolve a critical production issue.
steps: Check error logs and monitoring alerts
Reproduce the issue in staging environment
Identify root cause and affected systems

name: Onboard new team member
description: Set up a new engineer with all necessary tools and knowledge.
steps: Send welcome email with team info
Set up development environment and credentials
Schedule orientation meetings with department leads
Schedule code review for first PR

name: Deploy feature to staging
description: Move a completed feature to the staging environment for testing.
steps: Run all unit and integration tests locally
Create pull request with detailed description
Get code review from team members
Run smoke tests and QA verification

name: Update security policies
description: Review and update company security policies and practices.
steps: Identify outdated or missing security guidelines
Draft updated policies with security team input
Distribute to all staff with training requirements
Set reminder for annual policy review

name: Process customer refund request
description: Handle a customer request for refund or credit.
steps: Review customer account and order history
Check refund policy and approve if qualified

name: Conduct performance review
description: Complete annual performance review for direct report.
steps: Prepare observations on strengths and growth areas
Conduct meeting and discuss career goals
File review document in HR system

name: Migrate database to new server
description: Transfer database from old server to new infrastructure.
steps: Set up new database server with identical specs
Test data migration process in non-prod
Verify data integrity and run validation

name: Prepare quarterly business review
description: Compile metrics and prepare for quarterly business review presentation.
steps: Collect KPI data from all departments
Analyze trends and variances from targets
